analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet simply announces a press conference following a G7 leaders' videoconference on COVID-19 with EU leaders mentioned. It contains no evaluative claims about the EU’s success, unity, usefulness, leadership, values, or global contributions. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not promoted; there is no mention of history, successes, or overcoming obstacles. EU2 (unity) – not promoted; no claim of EU unity or solidarity. EU3 (useful for citizens) – not promoted; no reference to concrete EU measures benefiting citizens. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not promoted; no pioneering actions or leadership framed. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not promoted; no rights/democracy framing. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not promoted; while G7/ COVID-19 cooperation is implied, the tweet does not attribute global contributions to the EU.
